---
title: "Geography"
---

Welcome to **Geography OpenCourseWare** — a curated, open-access platform designed to help you master the full breadth of geographical knowledge, now aligned with the **NEP-2020 Undergraduate Curriculum**.

---

### Semester I
* [Physical Geography](physical-geography.html)
* [Human Geography](human-geography.html)

### Semester II
* [Population Geography](population-geography.html)
* [Cartography and Geo-Spatial Techniques](cartography.html)

### Semester III
* [Environmental Geography and Biogeography](environmental.html)
* [Quantitative Techniques in Geography](statistical-geography.html)
* [Economic Geography](economic-geography.html)

### Semester IV
* [Remote Sensing and GIS](gis-remote-sensing.html)
* [Geomorphology](geomorphology.html)
* [Evolution of Geographical Thought](geographical-thought.html)

### Semester V
* [Regional Planning and Development](regional-development.html)
* [Geography of Odisha](geography-of-odisha.html)
* [Climatology and Oceanography](climatology-and-oceanography.html)

### Semester VI
* [Geography of India](geography-of-india.html)
* [Urban Geography](urban-geography.html)

### Semester VII (With Research)
* [Research Methodology](research-methodology.html)
* [Natural Hazards and Disaster Management](natural-hazards.html)
* [Natural Resource Management and Geo informatics](natural-resource-management.html)
* [Human Development and Sustainable Development](human-development.html)

### Semester VIII (With Research)
* [Geospatial Modelling, AI and Machine Learning](geospatial-ai.html)
* [Field Survey: Tools and Technique](field-survey.html)
* [Political Geography and Globalisation](political-geography.html)
* [Social and Cultural Geography](social-and-cultural.html)

---

### Electives & Additional Modules (Existing Notes)
* [Climatology (Detailed Course)](climatology.html)
* [Oceanography (Detailed Course)](oceanography.html)
* [Settlement Geography](settlement-geography.html)
* [Agricultural Geography](agricultural-geography.html)
* [Industrial Geography](industrial-geography.html)
* [Trade and Transport](trade-and-transport.html)
* [Indian Physical Geography](indian-physical.html)
* [Indian Socio-Economic Geography](indian-socioeco.html)

### Supplementary Resources
* [UGC NET Previous Year Questions](ugc-net-pyq.html)
* [Reading Materials & Methodology](reading-materials.html)
* [Geography in News](geography-in-news.html)

---
